mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO NC.reference(dictionary, sort, content, page_info, text, note, locked) VALUES
(#{item.dictionary}, #{item.sort}, #{item.content}, #{item.pageInfo}, #{item.text}, #{item.note}, #{item.locked})
mapper.update: UPDATE NC.reference SET content = #{content}, text = #{text}, note = #{note}, page_info = #{pageInfo} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM NC.reference WHERE dictionary = #{dictionary} AND BINARY content = '/FRONT/' ORDER BY sort
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NC.reference WHERE BINARY dictionary IN ( SELECT code FROM NC.dictionary_info WHERE BINARY dialects LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dialect}, '%') )
